title: HQ
creator: Jeanbeaux
description: HQ stands for headquarters unit. A headquarters unit might be a heroic commander or fearsome monster. These models are amongst the most powerful in the game, and as leaders, they have access to more special equipment than anyone else. They are not invincible, but can provide a powerful spearhead for an attacking army and a strong core for a defensive one.
list: [[Hive Tyrant]] [[Tyrant Guard]] Tervigon [[Tyranid Prime]] [[The Swarmlord]] [[Old One Eye]] Deathleaper
